title: backmod
description: a nice mod of which adds the command /back to the game teleporting you to your last deaths coordinates
body: a mod that adds / back to your game please note this does not work across dimsions due to the simplicity of the code i might add multi dimensionality to the mod if someone asks but i dont know but if you want this to work so you can go back to space in ad astra  or smth just tell me and i might add it if i can
